channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: NLC urges government to reform power sector instead of approving N6trn bailout
item.description: The Nigeria Labour Congress (NLC) don come out strongly against the proposed N6 trillion bailout wey the government wan give power generation companies. NLC president, Joe Ajaero, yan say past financi...

item.title: Flint Firebirds defeat London Knights in final regular season game, Knights await playoff positioning
item.description: The Flint Firebirds managed to hold off a late comeback by the London Knights in their final OHL regular season game at the Dort Financial Center on Saturday. Flint surged ahead early, scoring three t...

item.title: Cuban deputy foreign minister says armed forces are preparing for possible U.S. military aggression
item.description: A senior Cuban official has said the island’s military is preparing for a possible U.S. military assault, amid heightened rhetoric from U.S. President Donald Trump and more aggressive economic pressur...

item.title: Nova Scotia Passenger's Trip to the Yukon Ruined by Lost Luggage from Porter Airlines
item.description: Daniel Doody, a Nova Scotia student in the military, had his trip to the Yukon marred by lost luggage, which contained essential winter gear for his visit. After a layover in Vancouver on March 13, he...

item.title: CHED Explains Status of Unsettled Audit Notices and Ongoing Resolutions
item.description: The Commission on Higher Education (CHED) released a statement on Sunday to clarify the issues regarding accumulated notices of suspension (NS) and notices of disallowance (ND) amounting to PHP 965.99...

item.title: Israel intensifies military campaign by demolishing homes in southern Lebanon
item.description: On March 23, 2026, Israel escalated its military actions in southern Lebanon, ordering the destruction of homes near the border as part of a broader strategy that also involved striking vital infrastr...

item.title: PM Narendra Modi Achieves Record as Longest-Serving Head of Government in India
item.description: On 22nd March 2026, Prime Minister Narendra Modi became India’s longest-serving head of government, surpassing the previous record held by former Sikkim Chief Minister Pawan Kumar Chamling. Modi’s tot...

item.title: Judiciary’s Role in Ensuring Free and Fair 2027 Elections in Kenya
item.description: Since the 2022 General Election, Kenya's judiciary has been playing an increasingly active role in shaping how elections are conducted, placing the Independent Electoral and Boundaries Commission (IEB...

item.title: The Statesman acquires UNI with anonymous loan amid financial distress
item.description: For years, The Statesman, one of India’s oldest English-language newspapers, struggled financially, failing to make profits for over a decade and owing substantial amounts to banks and creditors. Yet,...

item.title: Government unveils new sustainability standards for data centres and AI infrastructure
item.description: The Albanese Government has announced a new framework setting out expectations for data centre and artificial intelligence (AI) infrastructure proposals in Australia. These expectations prioritise pro...

item.title: Yakshagana Kalaranga of Udupi completes and hands over 91st free house to underprivileged beneficiary
item.description: Yakshagana Kalaranga, a cultural and social organisation based in Udupi, has handed over its 91st free house to a deserving beneficiary family, continuing its long‑standing humanitarian work in the re...

item.title: Tanzania and Italy Reinforce Agricultural Collaboration and Support for Farmers
item.description: Tanzania and Italy are working closely to improve agriculture sector, aiming at better food security, value addition, and sharing technical know-how. The commitment came from Agriculture Minister Dani...

item.title: Rele Mofokeng nets hat-trick in Pirates’ dominant 6-0 victory over TS Galaxy
item.description: Relebohile Mofokeng, fresh off being named the face of Bafana Bafana ahead of the 2026 FIFA World Cup, secured his first senior hat-trick, leading Orlando Pirates to an emphatic 6-0 victory over a 10-...

item.title: APC Schedules Screening for National Office Aspirants Before March Convention
item.description: The All Progressives Congress (APC) don announce say dem go conduct screening for all aspirants wey wan contest for national party positions on Tuesday, March 24, 2026, ahead of di national convention...

item.title: Chappell Roan apologizes after child fan upset by security encounter
item.description: Pop singer Chappell Roan addressed a recent incident involving Brazilian soccer player Jorginho Frello's 11-year-old daughter during their stay at a hotel in Brazil. According to Frello, his daughter ...

item.title: President Marcos pushes for faster completion of Marawi rehabilitation and UGCS infrastructure
item.description: President Ferdinand Marcos Jr. has directed the faster implementation of the long-delayed rehabilitation projects in Marawi City and the United Grand Central Station (UGCS), following updates from the...

item.title: Heavy Spring Snowstorm Hits Quebec and Atlantic Canada with Up to 50 cm Expected
item.description: Just two days after the official start of spring, parts of Quebec and Atlantic Canada are facing a heavy bout of snow. Environment Canada reports that the Greater Montreal Area, Monteregie, Drummondvi...

item.title: Controversial appointment of former Palm Island police officer to Queensland Legal Aid board sparks community concern
item.description: The Queensland government has faced criticism after appointing Darren Robinson, a former police detective involved in the 2004 Palm Island riots, to the Legal Aid Queensland board. Robinson was identi...

item.title: Political experts warn that Sasikala and Ramadoss tie-up could weaken NDA’s chances in Tamil Nadu
item.description: The news article discusses the political implications of a potential alliance between V.K. Sasikala, the close aide of former Chief Minister Jayalalithaa, and PMK leader Anbumani Ramadoss in the run-u...

item.title: Kimani Ichung'wah Stumbles during Nyanza Tour with President Ruto
item.description: Kikuyu MP Kimani Ichung'wah had an awkward moment during President William Ruto's development tour of the Nyanza region. After alighting from a plane in Kisumu, Ichung'wah attempted to jump over a wat...
